name: @koove/crypto
description: Koove zero-knowledge envelope encryption primitives (X25519 + AES-256-GCM + HKDF). Pure JS, auditable, shared by the SDK, CLI and control plane.

scripts.test: tsc src/__tests__/*.test.ts --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --target ES2020 --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --declaration false --outDir .tmp-test && node .tmp-test/__tests__/envelope.test.js && node .tmp-test/__tests__/attestation.test.js && node .tmp-test/__tests__/recovery.test.js; EXIT=$?; rm -rf .tmp-test; exit $EXIT
